content.en:
Inside the cyan palace.

Ye Tian walked in without encountering any danger.

Obviously, the words on that stele should be true.

If it is false, even if you kill others, you can only kill other people's clones, and others can gather their clones again to retaliate, so as to disturb the corpse of Lord Yang Lie, then it is not Lord Yang Lie's original intention~.

Therefore, it is impossible for Yang Yeol to find trouble for himself after death.

There are many treasures in the cyan palace, and they are suspended in a small space.

The moment he came in, Ye Tian knew that he could only choose three treasures, and once he had chosen three treasures, he would be expelled from the cyan palace.

Of course.

He could also choose to crack the means inside the cyan palace to take all the treasures, but it would inevitably take a long time, and at that time, some of the other demonic transcendent lords probably also survived the time trap and came here.

Therefore, the treasures here will eventually be empty

So there's no need to waste so much time.

"Time River Pearl, it should be here.

Ye Tian kept looking for it, and soon locked a treasure box.

He felt the power of time from this treasure box, and the location of this treasure box was located in the center of the cyan palace, it must be a very valuable item, and it was very likely to be the time river pearl.

Ye Tian spent some time browsing all the treasures here, and the contents of that treasure box were the most likely.

"That's it. "

Ye Tian took the treasure box, and immediately opened it to see that a gray and white bead was placed in the center of the box.

"It's really a river pearl of time!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

It may not be the most valuable item here, but it is definitely the rarest and most valuable item to him.

Accepted!

Ye Tian immediately began to choose other items, and he could also choose two.

Many of the treasures here are very good, although there are some ordinary ones, but even ordinary things are enough to make the heart of any Transcendent Legendary Lord excited, so those ordinary things are placed in the outer graveyards, that is, those palaces on the outside.

With so many good things, it was really difficult for Ye Tian to choose.

"Choose it!"

Ye Tian stared at one of the items and said.

This is an eternal treasure, and it is not an ordinary eternal treasure.

In the Void Zone, there is no hierarchical division of the general Eternal Arcana, but on the whole, the Eternal Arcana actually has a division, which can be divided into the lower Eternal Arcana, the middle Eternal Arcana, and the upper Eternal Arcana.

Among them, almost all of the upper-rank Eternal Treasures are in the hands of those peak Legendary Realm Lords, and the one in front of them is the Xing Piece Median Eternal Treasure, which is also the only Yang Lie Lord's Median Eternal Treasure.

However, there was damage to this Median Eternal Arcana, which should have been caused by the Sun Flame Lord when he fought the enemy.

However, the Eternal Arcana has the ability to hit me and repair, so the loss is not great now, and its value is still much stronger than those top-tier Eternal Arcana.

It can be said that the eternal treasure on Ye Tian's body is not as precious as this eternal treasure.

Wow!

Ye Tian took out the eternal treasure stored in the small space, which was in the shape of a shuttle.

Due to the particularity of this place, this Eternal Treasure was not in an untouchable state, and Ye Tian could easily touch it.

The moment he touched this shuttle, Ye Tian knew its name - Ruyi Void Tisot.

The median Eternal Treasure Ruyi Void Tissot contains a variety of powerful spatial Eternal Paths - the five Eternal Paths of Piercing the Sky, Splitting the Void, Crushing, Breaking the Sky and Ruyi, and these five Eternal Paths are biased towards space.

It can be said that if these five eternal paths are cultivated to the legendary realm, it will help Ye Tian control the space in the future.

These five Eternal Dao are also considered powerful Eternal Dao, but they are still inferior to the Gray Mist Eternal Dao.

"Yes, a median eternal treasure is still worth more than the Time River Bead, but the Time River Bead is even rarer. "

Ye Tian muttered.

It took him a moment to preliminarily control this Eternal Treasure Ruyi Void Tissot before putting it away.

At this moment, he can also choose an item

After a while, Ye Tian finally chose the third item-

"Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit!"

The Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit is a very precious treasure, it is a treasure that can be eaten, he has seen it in the treasure records of the True Saintless Land before, its only use is to enhance the strength of the will, and there are no sequelae.

Among the treasures that enhance the power of will, the Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit is listed as one of the top ten precious treasures.

However, it is too precious, and the effect is too great, even if the number is not too small, there are many people who need it, so except for a few Legendary Realm Lords, it is almost gone, even if any Legendary Lord obtains the Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit, he will directly eat the refining to enhance his will power.

In fact, many half-step Legendary Realm Lords were eager to obtain a Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit.

For Ye Tian, the effect of the Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit is also very great, it can help him break through the bottleneck of his will and impact the sixth-order will.

What is the concept of the sixth-order will, even if it is the transcendent realm lord and a few half-step legendary realm lords, the will is only the fifth order, and some legendary realm lords, the will is the sixth order, but basically they are all the late sixth-order will.

...........

The will of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord can reach the seventh order, and the will of the Eternal Master can even reach the eighth and ninth orders, which is too far away from him.

In short, once Ye Tian has the sixth-order will, his strength can be improved again, and the will rule heaven and earth will become even stronger.

Therefore, in terms of cost performance, the Forbidden Sky Sea Fruit helped him the most.

"Taken!"

Ye Tian directly took this forbidden heaven sea fruit away

At this time, a surge of power directly moved him out of the cyan palace.

When the three treasures arrived, Ye Tian also breathed a sigh of relief.

"If only I could go in again. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Suddenly.

He thought of something.

Maybe other people can't enter, because the doppelganger body is the same, and if you change a clone, you can't enter the cyan palace, and the detection of the legendary realm lord must be something that the legendary lords can't avoid.

However, he may be able to avoid it.

For example, if he copies the appearance of other legendary lords and enters this cyan palace, will the cyan palace be regarded as other legendary lords.

If this is the case, he can sweep away all the treasures in the cyan palace and leave none behind.

"You can try!"

Ye Tian said excitedly. _
